title.en: There may be a better solution, but he can't ge...

content.en:
The first layer of the Sanwu secret method is very mysterious and complex, but once practiced, it will form a Sanwutu, covering the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies with the Sanwutu, and promoting the integration of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies into the Sanwutu, under the influence of the Sanwutu, gradually fit together, and the rejection of each other will be suppressed by the Sanwutu or melted away by the Sanwutu.

As long as the three Utu are not broken, the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies will not be repulsed.

However, Ye Tian also knew very well that Sanwutu was only a symptom but not a cure, but at least it could be regarded as being able to solve the problem of rejection of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body.

There may be a better solution, but he can't get it right now.

Time flies.

Ye Tian has been comprehending the Sanwu secret method, but he has to admit that this secret method is too difficult to comprehend.

Even with the help of the Thirteen Blood-colored Treasure Lotus, an extra-dimensional era time could at most parse one percent of the Three Wu Secret Methods.

In other words, it would take him at least a hundred extradimensional epochs to truly comprehend the content of the first layer of the Three Black Secret Method.

"One hundred extra-dimensional 17 epochs are one hundred extra-dimensional eras, once I practice the Three Wu Secret Method, the benefits to me will be too great!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And in these 100 extradimensional eras, his replica body in the inheritance land of the Lord of the Wumu Realm was fully comprehended by the Nine Utu, and the secret method of comprehending the Three Crow was completed by other replica bodies.

Rumble!!!!

His soul will entered the Nine Utu, silently comprehending the extra-dimensional rules contained in the Nine Utu, coupled with the effect of multi-dimensional wisdom light, the comprehension of the super-dimensional rules is getting deeper and deeper, and the realm of the super-dimensional rules is also rapidly improving.

Before you know it, a hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

"Twenty-six extra-dimensional rule realms!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Jiuwutu is worthy of being a treasure rewarded by the sixth realm, and it has helped him to improve the realm of extradimensional rules too much!

At the beginning, his extradimensional rules were still fifteen, but now they have been directly improved to twenty-six.

In short, before the extra-dimensional rules are upgraded to the realm of one hundred extra-dimensional rules, there is no need to worry about bottlenecks.

And once he comprehends a hundred transcendent rule realms, he can 100% break through to the fourth realm.

At that time, although Jiuwutu was not of much help to him, he could leave it to the Terran Race and cultivate more Fourth Realm Transcendental Realms for the Terran Race.

The value of Jiuwutu is simply an incredible treasure for a force.

"Not only has the realm of super-dimensional rules been raised to twenty-six super-dimensional rules, but the Sanwu secret method is also about to be comprehended!"

Ye Tian tried his best to comprehend the Three Wu Secret Method.

this day.

The secret method of Sanwu was finally realized by him.

Rumble!!!!

Two phantoms of multi-dimensional golden crows appeared on Ye Tian's body, surrounding his body, and gradually forming a three-dimensional black figure.

Then, the three Utu merged into the body, enveloping the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body and the Wu Mu Body.

Gradually, the rejection of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies disappeared.

Not only that, but the Sanwu secret method can also slowly repair the physical damage caused by rejection.

However, Ye Tian didn't care about physical damage, he could completely recondense and copy his body, re-cultivate the body of the black mother, and then cultivate the three black secret methods at the same time, so that there would be no physical damage.

"The Sanwu Secret Method is only the first layer of entry, and it is promoted to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng, so that it can truly urge the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies without limit!"

Ye Tian also knew very well that the difficulty of cultivating the Three Wu Secret Method, it was so difficult to enter the first layer, and the years it would take to cultivate it to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng were absolutely terrifying, but as long as he was given enough time, he would be able to truly break through to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng.

......

Wu Mu Zhentu sensed that Ye Tian had practiced the Three Wu Secret Method at this moment, and a light enveloped him.

Seeing this scene, Weimu Chilong was dumbfounded, he never expected Ye Tian to complete the second test, he hadn't even passed the first test, and he didn't know what the second test was.

At this moment, he was really envious.

And Ye Tian was choosing a reward at this time, and the reward after the completion of the second test was undoubtedly better, and the grade was raised by one level.

In the last reward, he chose Jiuwutu, but now there are more rewards that are better than Jiuwutu.

Ye Tian looked at one treasure after another, and finally had a choice.

"That's it!"

He chose the Soul Treasure Bottle, which was a quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure, but it was much higher than the grade of Jiuwutu, it was very close to the real innate multi-dimensional treasure, and there was only one last step left before the advanced innate multi-dimensional treasure, but it was taken away before the final transformation was completed.

However, the value of the Soul Treasure Bottle is not even inferior to that of ordinary innate multi-dimensional treasures, because it can help the transcendental realm temporarily improve its understanding, and instead of improving it a little bit, it will skyrocket by ten times or even more than a hundred times.

It's just that the price of using the Soul Bottle is very high, and the initial use will only deplete the mind a little, and the soul will be weak, but if you urge the Soul Bottle with all your might, it is normal for the soul will to be broken and the heart will be exhausted and die.

Even if there is a treasure that can restore the will of the soul and the mind, if used for a long time, it will still leave incurable traces, which will limit the future breakthrough to a higher realm, resulting in the future can no longer break through.

But Ye Tian doesn't care!

The Soul Treasure Vase is too suitable for him, not only can it assist him in comprehending the Three Black Secret Methods, but it can also cooperate with the Thirteenfold Blood Lotus and the Multi-dimensional Wisdom Light to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules!

The multi-dimensional wisdom light is also used to improve understanding, and with the words of the Soul Treasure Bottle 683, the effect is even more terrifying.

So.

He chose the Soul Vase.

Wow!

The Soul Vase appeared, fell into his hands, and belonged to him completely.

Then, the light cleared, and all was calm again.

I thought there was a third test, but I didn't expect the third test to be gone.

However, the true picture of the black mother completely gave him the complete inheritance of the black mother's body.

"It's a pity, there are no tests, if I give a few more tests, I can get more treasures!"

Ye Tian regretted it.

There were so many good things, and every one of them was a supreme treasure, and he wanted to take them all.

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, there is no test here, I'm leaving, what about you?"

Ye Tian asked.

The tricky wood red dragon didn't want to go, he shook his head: "Ye Tian, you leave first, I want to continue to comprehend the true diagram of the black mother here, I must obtain the first layer of the black mother's body and practice it!"

"Okay, then you stay here, I'll go first!"

Ye Tian left from the extradimensional channel.

He originally wanted to go to the other fifteen safe extradimensional passages, but he didn't expect that the other fifteen extradimensional passages would not allow him to enter.

"Sure enough, there are no loopholes, that Wumu Realm Lord won't let an extradimensional realm get too much!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian left directly.
